description: Status must query GH via `gh issue list -R $GH_TASK_REPO --state open --label status:*` for Ready/In Progress/Blocked/Backlog counts
Pending-handover detection must use the --label type:handover filter, not the old `[Handover]` title prefix heuristic
Skill must have a ## Config block pointing at brain-os.config.md so vault_path + gh_task_repo can be resolved
